_comment: Auto-update manifest consumed by tauri-plugin-updater. Updated alongside each tagged release. The signature field carries a minisign signature of the corresponding installer; the matching public key is baked into apps/desktop/tauri.conf.json under plugins.updater.pubkey.
notes: Mycelium v0.78.0-beta.1 - The Mycelium Promise: a binding, versioned commitment that the official version stays free, server-less, and uncollectable. Local-first - no server, no account, no telemetry; at-rest encryption is ChaCha20-Poly1305 with a 256-bit key from 50,000 iterations of BLAKE3, no master key and no backdoor. Includes an honest disclaimer that the promise binds the official signed build ONLY - open source means anyone can fork, and a malicious fork can strip these protections. Surfaced in Settings -> About and in PROMISE.md at the repo root. See https://github.com/Arka-ui/mycelium/releases/tag/v0.78.0-beta.1 for full notes.
